verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, how good it is When brethren dwell together, Dwell together in unity; Oh, how good it is When brethren dwell together, Dwell together in unity.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For there the Lord Commands a blessing, Life forevermore; For there the Lord Commands a blessing, Life forevermore

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For there the Lord Pours out His Spirit, Like a river that overflows; For there the Lord Pours out His Spirit, Let Your river flow.
